s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR LOWER FRAME BRACKET GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the front door lower frame bracket garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 3 claws, and remove the front door inside handle bezel plug.
Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 6 claws and remove the assist grip cover.
Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the claw and remove the courtesy light assembly.
Disconnect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws and clip (A).
Using a clip remover, disengage the 9 clips.
Pull up the front door trim board in the direction indicated by the arrow.
Disengage the reference bosses from the front door panel.
Raise the front door trim board to disengage the 4 claws and remove the front door trim board together with the front door inner glass weatherstrip.
Disengage the 2 claws and disconnect the front door inside handle sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 clips as shown in the illustration and remove the front door inner glass weatherstrip from the front door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR INSIDE HANDLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the front door lock remote control cable and front door inside locking cable and remove the front door inside handle sub-assembly.
Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 4 bolts and front No. 1 speaker assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Do not touch the cone part of the speaker.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector and each clamp, and remove the front door service hole cover.

atten4.ptxt: Remove the remaining butyl tape on the door side.

s2.ptxt: Connect the front power window regulator motor assembly connector.
Connect the power window regulator master switch assembly and move the front door glass sub-assembly so that the door glass bolts can be seen.
Remove the 2 bolts.

atten3.ptxt: After the bolts are removed, the door glass may fall, causing damage.

s2.ptxt: Remove the front door glass sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Do not damage the door glass.

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the power window regulator master switch assembly and front power window regulator motor assembly connector.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR REAR LOWER FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and the front door rear lower frame sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the hole plug.
Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T30), loosen the screw and remove the front door outside handle cover and the door lock key cylinder as a unit.

atten4.ptxt: The screw cannot be removed because it is integrated into the front door outside handle frame sub-assembly.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws and remove the front door outside handle cover.
Disconnect the connector.
Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), remove the 3 screws.
Slide the front door lock assembly downward and pull out the front door lock open rod from the outside handle frame. Remove the front door lock assembly and cables as a unit.
Remove the front door lock open rod from the front door lock assembly.
Remove the door lock wiring harness seal from the front door lock assembly.
Remove the front door lock remote control cable assembly.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the 3 claws.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Remove the front door inside locking cable assembly.
